word: G4017 - περιβλέπω - periblépō - per-ee-blep'-o - Look about

sections.paragraph:
- Original: περιβλέπω

- Transliteration: Periblepo

- Phonetic: per-ee-blep'-o

- Definition:

1. to look around

2. to look around about one's self

3. to look round on one (i.e. to look for one's self at one near by)

- Origin: from G4012 and G991

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4012 and G991; to look all around: - look (round) about (on).
